news.title:
ACC reports 17% volume growth from capacity utilization and premium products.
ACC, Orient Cement, and Ambuja propose merger; cost reductions achieved in fuel, power, logistics.
news.summary:
ACC reports 17% volume growth from capacity utilization and premium products.
ACC, Orient Cement, and Ambuja propose merger; cost reductions achieved in fuel, power, logistics.

news.title:
ACC Ltd shared the Q3 FY26 earnings call transcript on its website, highlighting industry-leading performance with volumes growing 2x the industry average.
The amalgamation of ACC and Orient Cement with Ambuja Cements aims to create a unified platform, accelerating growth and operational efficiency in the cement sector.
news.summary:
ACC Ltd shared the Q3 FY26 earnings call transcript on its website, highlighting industry-leading performance with volumes growing 2x the industry average.
The amalgamation of ACC and Orient Cement with Ambuja Cements aims to create a unified platform, accelerating growth and operational efficiency in the cement sector.

news.title: Citi downgrades ACC to Neutral and sets target price at 1,755 post-merger adjustments.
news.summary: Citi downgrades ACC to Neutral and sets target price at 1,755 post-merger adjustments.

news.title:
ACC Ltd fell 1.97%, closing at Rs.1,637.50, underperforming Sensex's 1.62% gain.
Quarterly profit contraction and 52-week low impacted market sentiment despite record revenue growth.
news.summary:
ACC Ltd fell 1.97%, closing at Rs.1,637.50, underperforming Sensex's 1.62% gain.
Quarterly profit contraction and 52-week low impacted market sentiment despite record revenue growth.

news.title:
ACC Ltd shared the audio recording link of its analyst/investor call.
The call pertained to Q3 and nine-month Unaudited Financial Results ending Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
ACC Ltd shared the audio recording link of its analyst/investor call.
The call pertained to Q3 and nine-month Unaudited Financial Results ending Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
ACC Ltd. reports a 460.6% YoY profit surge to ₹1,119.2 crore in Q3 FY26.
Profit jump driven by tax credits; stock fell 0.18% to ₹1,685.5 post-results.
news.summary:
ACC Ltd. reports a 460.6% YoY profit surge to ₹1,119.2 crore in Q3 FY26.
Profit jump driven by tax credits; stock fell 0.18% to ₹1,685.5 post-results.

news.title:
ACC Ltd posted record cement volume of 11.3 Mn tonnes, up 15% YoY.
Q3 FY26 PAT surged 346% YoY to Rs 380 Cr; revenue rose 22% to Rs 6,483 Cr.
news.summary:
ACC Ltd posted record cement volume of 11.3 Mn tonnes, up 15% YoY.
Q3 FY26 PAT surged 346% YoY to Rs 380 Cr; revenue rose 22% to Rs 6,483 Cr.

news.title:
ACC Ltd approved unaudited financials for Q3 and 9M ending Dec 31, 2025.
Changes in senior management, asset sales, labor code impacts, and merger with Ambuja announced.
news.summary:
ACC Ltd approved unaudited financials for Q3 and 9M ending Dec 31, 2025.
Changes in senior management, asset sales, labor code impacts, and merger with Ambuja announced.

news.title: ACC reports Q3 revenue of ₹63.7B, up from ₹52B YoY, showing growth.
news.summary: ACC reports Q3 revenue of ₹63.7B, up from ₹52B YoY, showing growth.

news.title:
ACC faces ₹40.1 crore GST demand from Punjab and Bihar authorities over alleged ITC violations.
ACC plans to appeal and expects no material financial or operational impact. Shares closed at ₹1,737, up 0.3% on BSE.
news.summary:
ACC faces ₹40.1 crore GST demand from Punjab and Bihar authorities over alleged ITC violations.
ACC plans to appeal and expects no material financial or operational impact. Shares closed at ₹1,737, up 0.3% on BSE.

news.title:
ACC faces tax demand orders worth ₹401.4M, possibly affecting finances.
This development may influence ACC's market perception negatively.
news.summary:
ACC faces tax demand orders worth ₹401.4M, possibly affecting finances.
This development may influence ACC's market perception negatively.

news.title: ACC Ltd faces total tax demand orders amounting to Rs 401.4 million.
news.summary: ACC Ltd faces total tax demand orders amounting to Rs 401.4 million.

news.title:
ACC and Orient Cement merger approved, cement sector gains focus.
Shareholders to assess implications of the ACC-Orient Cement merger.
news.summary:
ACC and Orient Cement merger approved, cement sector gains focus.
Shareholders to assess implications of the ACC-Orient Cement merger.

news.title:
Shriram Finance confirms no leadership or operational changes post MUFG's 20% stake acquisition. ACC Ltd approves merger with Ambuja Cements under Adani Group.
Gold and silver surge on US rate cut expectations. India finalizes an FTA with New Zealand, its third this fiscal. Corporate donations shift to electoral trusts post SC ruling.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance confirms no leadership or operational changes post MUFG's 20% stake acquisition. ACC Ltd approves merger with Ambuja Cements under Adani Group.
Gold and silver surge on US rate cut expectations. India finalizes an FTA with New Zealand, its third this fiscal. Corporate donations shift to electoral trusts post SC ruling.

news.title:
ACC receives regulatory approval for merger with Ambuja Cements.
Ambuja Cements to issue 328 shares for every 100 ACC shares.
news.summary:
ACC receives regulatory approval for merger with Ambuja Cements.
Ambuja Cements to issue 328 shares for every 100 ACC shares.

news.title:
ACC Ltd announces resignation of Chief Sales & Marketing Officer, Navin Malhotra, effective Dec 6, 2025.
Malhotra steps down to pursue external career opportunities; resignation details shared with SEBI and exchanges.
news.summary:
ACC Ltd announces resignation of Chief Sales & Marketing Officer, Navin Malhotra, effective Dec 6, 2025.
Malhotra steps down to pursue external career opportunities; resignation details shared with SEBI and exchanges.

news.title:
ACC Ltd faces Rs. 5.1 crore disallowed ITC claim by tax authorities.
Includes Rs. 2.6 crore CGST, SGST; Rs. 51 lakh penalty imposed; appeal planned.
news.summary:
ACC Ltd faces Rs. 5.1 crore disallowed ITC claim by tax authorities.
Includes Rs. 2.6 crore CGST, SGST; Rs. 51 lakh penalty imposed; appeal planned.

news.title:
LIC raises stake in ACC Ltd to 10.6% and NBCC India to 4.5%, through market purchases from May to Nov 2025.
ACC stock declined 15% in 1 year, while NBCC rose 20%; ACC trades 20% below its 52-week high.
news.summary:
LIC raises stake in ACC Ltd to 10.6% and NBCC India to 4.5%, through market purchases from May to Nov 2025.
ACC stock declined 15% in 1 year, while NBCC rose 20%; ACC trades 20% below its 52-week high.

news.title:
Govt plans to revamp PLI schemes to boost battery manufacturing.
This move is expected to benefit ACC players significantly as per ET Now.
news.summary:
Govt plans to revamp PLI schemes to boost battery manufacturing.
This move is expected to benefit ACC players significantly as per ET Now.

news.title:
ACC's stock fell 10% in a year, lagging peers despite strong Q2FY26 numbers.
Sales growth driven by the master supply agreement with Ambuja; medium-term growth hinges on Adani Group's strategy.
news.summary:
ACC's stock fell 10% in a year, lagging peers despite strong Q2FY26 numbers.
Sales growth driven by the master supply agreement with Ambuja; medium-term growth hinges on Adani Group's strategy.
